variants_defined.description: Current raw LLM with execute_sql and call_api, no extra scaffolding.
Current guided prompt baseline with schema/API affordances.
LLM outputs a structured plan before tool use.
Adds compact schema and endpoint retrieval context for LLM SQL planning.
Adds SQLValidator/SQLGlot validation and up to two repair rounds.
Locks final answer claims to structured tool observations.
Combines planning, schema retrieval, SQL repair, API validation, and evidence-locked answer.
LLM emits structured SQL plan JSON; deterministic compiler emits validated SQL without repair.

Structured SQL plan with deterministic tool-evidence answer fallback only.
